data.title: ENERGIZER HOLDINGS, INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND ON ITS COMMON STOCK
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) revealed that a dividend of $0.30 per share was approved by its Board of Directors. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 10, 2026, to all shareholders on record as of May 20.

data.title: GHIRARDELLI CHOCOLATE COMPANY RECALLS POWDERED BEVERAGE MIXES BECAUSE OF POSSIBLE HEALTH RISK
data.description: In San Leandro, California, Ghirardelli Chocolate Company has decided to recall specific powdered beverage mixes due to possible Salmonella contamination. The voluntary recall was made after concerns were raised about the products potentially being affected. The affected products are linked to California Dairies, Inc. milk and have prompted the company to take action to ensure consumer safety. The recall affects a certain number of products and is an effort to prevent any potential health risks associated with the consumption of the contaminated mixes.

data.title: Hut 8 Announces Pricing of $3.25 Billion of Investment-Grade Senior Secured Notes for River Bend Data Center Project
data.description: Hut 8 Corp, listed on Nasdaq and TSX under symbol HUT, has secured a project financing with full amortization scheduled for repayment by 2042. The financing is non-recourse to the company, providing financial security. Hut 8 Corp focuses on energy infrastructure, blending power, digital infrastructure, and large-scale compute capabilities to drive operations.

data.title: Veradigm Doubles India-Based Employee Footprint, Adds New Managing Director
data.description: Veradigm® India Private Limited, the Indian arm of Veradigm (OTCMKTS: MDRX), a prominent US-based provider of clinical and revenue cycle solutions for independent practices, disclosed a substantial move in its Pune establishment. The expansion includes a doubling of office space and the appointment of a new managing director. This event signifies a crucial phase in Veradigm’s expansion, underscoring its dedication to enhancing its workforce, infrastructure, and overarching strategy.

data.title: fal Launches HappyHorse-1.0, the #1-Ranked AI Video Model, as Official API Partner
data.description: A cutting-edge video model named Happy Horse has been launched on April 27th through fal's generative media cloud for developers and enterprises in San Francisco. The AI video model, HappyHorse-1.0, is now accessible to developers and enterprises, marking the beginning of a new era in video technology. The release of this state-of-the-art model signifies a major advancement in the field, offering innovative capabilities to users.

A$100 million from Rio Tinto will go toward improving housing for essential service workers in the Pilbara.

data.title: Rio Tinto’s A$100m boost for essential service worker housing in the Pilbara
data.description: Perth-based mining company Rio Tinto has announced a hefty investment of A$100 million to aid the Western Australian Government in constructing over 500 homes for frontline workers in the region. This initiative is in line with Rio Tinto's Seven Cities Vision for regional Western Australia. The Government Regional Officer Housing (GROH) program will oversee the development of these homes in Karratha, a significant location for Rio Tinto's employees, as well as their fly-in fly-out hubs in Broome, Geraldton, and Albany. This marks Rio Tinto's substantial commitment to supporting essential workers and contributing to the local communities in which they operate.

data.title: Investment firm buys 3,273 Bitcoin at $77,000 each for $255M, increasing total holdings to 818,334 BTC.
data.description: Acquiring 3,273 BTC for $255 million, Michael Saylor’s Strategy used MSTR stock sales to fund this purchase, expanding its total holdings to 818,334 BTC.
